summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new PIN authentication and public quote features for Sr-Renovation.fr. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.

pin_auth_tests.test_verify_pin_success: PASS - PIN 0330 returns success with authenticated: true
pin_auth_tests.test_recover_pin_success: PASS - Recovery email sent to admin

public_quote_tests.test_public_quote_access_with_valid_toke: PASS - Returns quote data without auth
public_quote_tests.test_public_quote_opened_tracking: PASS - opened_at timestamp set on first access
public_quote_tests.test_public_quote_sign: PASS - Signature saved, status changed to 'accepted'

send_email_tests.test_send_quote_email_success: PASS - Email sent, status updated to 'sent'

tracking_tests.test_quotes_api_returns_tracking_fields: PASS - sent_at, opened_at, signed_at, public_token all present

frontend_tests.pin_screen_displays: PASS - PIN screen blocks access at root URL
frontend_tests.pin_wrong_code_rejected: PASS - Wrong PIN (1111) shows error, stays on PIN screen
frontend_tests.pin_correct_code_authenticates: PASS - PIN 0330 authenticates and redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.pin_change_form_accessible: PASS - 'Changer le code' shows change PIN form with current/new inputs
frontend_tests.public_quote_page_elements: PASS - Quote info, services table, totals, signature section all visible
frontend_tests.signature_canvas_visible: PASS - Canvas with 'Signez ici' placeholder present
frontend_tests.quotes_list_send_button: PASS - 'Envoyer' buttons present on each quote card
frontend_tests.send_quote_modal_opens: PASS - Modal shows with email, subject, message fields

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly following the PRD
PIN stored in MongoDB settings collection with id 'app_settings'
Public tokens use secrets.token_urlsafe(32) for security
Email sending via Resend API with graceful error handling
SessionStorage 'sr_auth' used for client-side auth state
seed_data_creation: Created test clients and quotes during pytest - cleaned up via /api/cleanup/test-data
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: (1) PIN auth with verify/change/recover endpoints - default PIN is 0330 stored in MongoDB settings collection. (2) Public quote page at /devis/public/{token} bypasses PIN, shows quote details with signature canvas. (3) Send quote email via Resend API updates status to 'sent'. (4) Tracking badges (Envoyé/Ouvert/Signé) display on quotes list. All features working correctly.
